data.name: CUMBOY IN SPACE
data.detailed_description:
In the year 3000, space exploration reached its peak. Mankind was able to curb the galaxy and travel between planets in just a couple of days. But the happy times were short-lived. Endless warfare gripped the earth. Chaos erupted and peaceful times came to an end. Long years of war divided the nations into even smaller factions, and a new era of planetary colonizers began.

In the game you will find:

- One-handed play

- Sex stories with videos and pictures

- 3 hot women

- Achievements that are easy to unlock

- Minimal boring scenes

Get on board the spaceship and head out to explore the expanse of sweet pussy!

data.short_description: CUMBOY IN SPACE is a visual novel where you will be playing a male character. It is a space drama in an alternate history, where you will have hot sex with beautiful women and decide the fate of the galaxy.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11 or newer
  • 處理器: Intel Dual-Core 2.4 GHz
  • 記憶體: 2 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 800 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11 or newer
  • 處理器: Intel Dual-Core 2.4 GHz
  • 記憶體: 2 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 800 MB 可用空間
